title: CPU requests should be specified
description: Without a CPU request, a container can potentially be scheduled on a node where there are not enough resources for it. This can lead to unpredictable behavior of the container and the node itself. What is the potential impact? Unpredictable Resource Allocation Without defined requests, Kubernetes doesn’t know how much of a particular resource to allocate to a container.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Container is missing CPU requests. Set resources.requests.cpu to ensure predictable resource allocation and prevent scheduling issues.
